description_long: This object depicts a horse with a dark brown coat and a white muzzle, but its body is highly distorted, with elongated, angular limbs that stretch unnaturally away from the torso. The head and facial features are realistic, with upright ears and a short mane, but the legs appear to be unnaturally extended and bent at sharp angles, giving the figure a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The torso is broad and muscular, but the unnatural stretching of the limbs disrupts the typical equine proportions. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, resembling the look of a real horse's coat. No tack or equipment is visible on the horse, and there is no rider present. The overall form is visually striking and would stand out in any urban environment due to its unusual, distorted anatomy.
description: A dark brown horse with a white muzzle and realistic head, but with limbs and body unnaturally stretched and angular, creating a surreal, abstract appearance.
description_view_0: The horse's head and face are prominent, with the elongated limbs extending dramatically outward and downward from the body.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full extent of the limb distortion, with the front and rear legs stretched at sharp angles and the head turned slightly forward.
description_view_2: From the rear, the horse's hindquarters and tail are visible, with the legs splayed outward in an unnatural fashion.
description_view_3: Another side view shows the horse's head in profile and the exaggerated length of the limbs, emphasizing the surreal body proportions.
attribute_pose: The horse is depicted in a highly distorted, abstract pose with limbs unnaturally stretched and splayed.
attribute_mane_style: The mane is short and natural, lying flat along the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are extended outward at unnatural angles, with none in a typical weight-bearing stance.
